prompts.label: Explicit Screenshot Summary
prompts.prompt: Summarise the focus of this screenshot.

prompts.label: Explicit Image Summary
prompts.prompt: Summarise the focus of this image.

prompts.label: Explicit Image Summary And Table
prompts.prompt: Summarise the focus of this language unit in the image and tabulate the provided examples side by side for translation.

prompts.label: Implicit Source Summary And Table
prompts.prompt: Summarise the focus of this language unit and tabulate the provided examples side by side for translation.

prompts.label: Read Text And Table
prompts.prompt: Read the text from this image and tabulate the Korean and English examples side by side.

prompts.label: Original Text Extraction
prompts.prompt: Get the original text from the image.

prompts.label: Anchored Unit Focus And Translation Table
prompts.prompt: What is the focus of this language unit in the image, and can you make a two-column translation table of the examples?

prompts.label: Tabulate Examples Only
prompts.prompt: Tabulate the provided examples side by side for translation from the image.
